__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB - Server Monitoring
__inputs.description: Datasource InfluxDB v2 configurado con Flux

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_status" and r._field == "status_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_status" and r._field == "status_reason" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value == "all_conditions_optimal" then 0 else if r._value == "network_disconnected" then 1 else if r._value == "door_open" then 2 else if r._value == "temperature_warning_high" then 3 else if r._value == "temperature_critical_high" then 4 else if r._value == "warning_low" then 5 else if r._value == "warning_high" then 6 else if r._value == "critical_low" then 7 else if r._value == "critical_high" then 8 else if r._value == "tilt_warning" then 9 else if r._value == "tilt_critical" then 10 else if r._value == "vibration_warning" then 11 else if r._value == "vibration_critical" then 12 else if r._value == "dht_sensor_error" then 13 else if r._value == "mpu_sensor_error" then 14 else if r._value == "door_unlocked_closed" then 15 else if r._value == "door_open_authorized" then 16 else if r._value == "door_open_forced" then 17 else if r._value == "door_lock_error" then 18 else 99 }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_status" and r._field == "network_online" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_status" and r._field == "last_will_online" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_environment" and r._field == "temperature_c" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_environment" and r._field == "temperature_c" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Temperatura")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_environment" and r._field == "humidity_pct" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_environment" and r._field == "humidity_pct" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Humedad")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_door" and r._field == "door_open" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_door" and r._field == "door_state" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_motion" and r._field == "position" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_motion" and r._field == "tilt_deg" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_motion" and r._field == "vibration_level" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_components" and r._field == "component_state" and r.sensor == "position" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value == "optimal" then 0 else if r._value == "not_vertical" or r._value == "tilt_warning" or r._value == "vibration_warning" then 1 else 2 }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_motion" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["tilt_deg", "pitch_deg", "roll_deg"]) and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Angulos")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_motion" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["accel_x", "accel_y", "accel_z"]) and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Aceleracion")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_components" and r._field == "component_state" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> group(columns: ["sensor"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["sensor", "_value", "_time"])
  |> rename(columns: {sensor: "Componente", _value: "Estado", _time: "Ultima actualizacion"})

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_components" and r._field == "component_state" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["sensor"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_control" and r._field == "mode_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_actuators" and r._field == "fan_power_pct" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_actuators" and r._field == "door_lock_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_security" and r._field == "door_security_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_security" and r._field == "access_event_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rack_control" and r._field == "mode_code" and r.device_id == "${device_id}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
